254 HEALED_STG_3_PRSR_ULCRS_NUM HEALED_STG_3_PRSR_ULCRS_NUM M0900C Healed Stage 3 Pressure Ulcers Number CHAR 1 The number of Stage 3 pressure ulcers that were: (a) present on Admission; and (b) have completely closed (resurfaced with epithelium) upon Discharge.
